zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Somerville於1176年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓時，她的父親Roger de Somerville23歲，母親Matilda Cossington Lady of Cossington20歲。她和Geoffrey de Greasley至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1244年在英國德比夏爾德比享年68歲。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Somerville was born in 1176, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England, her father, Roger de Somerville, was 23 and her mother, Matilda Cossington Lady of Cossington, was 20. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Geoffrey de Greasley. She died in 1244, in Derby, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Somerville est née en 1176, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Somerville, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Matilda Cossington Lady of Cossington, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Geoffrey de Greasley. Elle est décédée en 1244, à Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Somerville 1176 in Cossington, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger de Somerville 23 und ihre Mutter Matilda Cossington Lady of Cossington 20. Sie hatte mit Geoffrey de Greasley mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1244 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Derby, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Somerville è nata il nel 1176 nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Roger de Somerville, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Matilda Cossington Lady of Cossington, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Geoffrey de Greasley. Morì nel 1244, nel Derby, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Somervilleが1176年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンで生まれた時，父Roger de Somervilleは23歳，母Matilda Cossington Lady of Cossingtonは20歳であった。彼女はGeoffrey de Greasleyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1244年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Somerville(이)가 1176년 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Somerville(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Cossington Lady of Cossington(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Geoffrey de Greasley(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 영국 더비실르 더비에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Somerville nasceu em 1176, em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Somerville, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Cossington Lady of Cossington, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Geoffrey de Greasley. Ela faleceu em 1244, em Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Somerville родилась в 1176 г. в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger de Somerville было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Cossington Lady of Cossington, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Geoffrey de Greasley. Она умерла в 1244 г. в местности дирби, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Somerville nació en 1176, en Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger de Somerville, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Matilda Cossington Lady of Cossington, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Geoffrey de Greasley. Murió en 1244, en Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
